summary: International user plain ESPN - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is located outside the United States
AND the subscriber is entitled for live game playback
AND a regular season game is scheduled with ESPN broadcaster
AND the game is not ESPN Sunday Night Baseball

steps.action: WHEN a user selects a scheduled/in-progress ESPN game tile
steps.result:
THEN the user will see an ESPN feed button
AND the user can playback the ESPN feed
